overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a first-person walk through a misty prairie landscape. The player travels along a dirt trail past a distinctive rock formation, encounters a horse-drawn carriage, and discovers a dead deer carcass on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie trail with prominent rock formation

events.description: horse-drawn carriage enters from the right and moves across the field of view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt trail through grassland toward a large layered rock formation

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage traveling from right to left, crossing the path ahead

entered.detail: tall layered rock outcrop rising from the prairie grass
worn dirt path cutting through the grassland
rolling green grassland with scattered low bushes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a misty morning prairie with a prominent layered rock formation ahead. The camera walks steadily along a dirt trail through tall grass. Around 11 seconds, a horse-drawn carriage enters from the right and crosses the path, moving perpendicular to the camera's direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie valley with distant mountains

events.description: morning mist clears and sunlight becomes more direct and warm
horse-drawn carriage appears ahead on the trail, moving in the same direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt trail through open prairie, approaching a carriage ahead

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage traveling along the trail ahead, gradually moving further away

entered.detail: hazy blue mountains forming the horizon backdrop
low rocky formations scattered across the grassy hillside

segments.scene_description: Having passed the large rock formation, the scene opens into a wide prairie valley with distant mountains visible through the clearing morning mist. The lighting shifts to warmer, more direct sunlight. Around 32 seconds, a horse-drawn carriage appears ahead on the trail, traveling in the same direction as the camera.

events.description: dead deer carcass appears on the left side of the trail
camera slows and stops to examine the dead animal closely

agents.ego_description: approaching a dead deer on the trail, stopping to examine the carcass, then continuing forward

entered.detail: dead deer lying on its side in the grass beside a small puddle, with visible wounds
shallow water pool in the dirt trail next to the carcass

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a dead deer carcass lying beside a small puddle on the trail. The camera slows down and stops to examine the animal closely, showing its wounds and position in the grass, before continuing past it and resuming the journey along the dirt path through the open prairie.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a misty prairie that gradually opens into a sun-drenched valley. It begins with a steady walk along a dirt trail through tall grass toward a prominent layered rock formation, just as a horse-drawn carriage crosses the path from the right. As the camera passes the rocks, the morning mist clears to reveal a wide prairie valley with distant mountains while the lighting shifts to a warmer, more direct sunlight. The scene then follows another carriage traveling ahead on the trail before slowing to a stop beside a dead deer carcass lying in a small puddle. After a close examination of the animal's wounds, the camera continues forward, resuming its journey along the dirt path through the open landscape.
